title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: LAKE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 1250 S 9th Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (541) 947-6045 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 947-6045 Miranda Philibert [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lake County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - FLUORIDE VARNISH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAKE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
